spreads.name: Single Card
spreads.description: A single card drawn for a quick answer, daily guidance, or simple yes/no questions.

positions.name: The Message
positions.description: The core message or answer to your question.

spreads.name: Three Card – Past / Present / Future
spreads.description: The classic three-card spread revealing the timeline of a situation.

positions.name: Past
positions.description: Events, influences, or energies from the past shaping the present.

positions.name: Present
positions.description: The current state of affairs, what is happening right now.

positions.name: Future
positions.description: The likely outcome or direction if things continue on the current path.

spreads.name: Three Card – Situation / Action / Outcome
spreads.description: Practical spread for decisions and action-oriented questions.

positions.name: Situation
positions.description: The current situation or challenge you face.

positions.name: Action
positions.description: The recommended action or approach to take.

positions.name: Outcome
positions.description: The likely outcome if you take the recommended action.

spreads.name: Love & Relationship Spread
spreads.description: A five-card spread exploring the dynamics, challenges, and potential of a romantic relationship.

positions.name: You
positions.description: Your current energy, feelings, and role in this relationship.

positions.name: Your Partner / Person of Interest
positions.description: Their energy, feelings, and perspective in this relationship.

positions.name: The Connection
positions.description: The nature and quality of the connection between you.

positions.name: The Challenge
positions.description: The main obstacle or challenge this relationship faces.

positions.name: Potential / Outcome
positions.description: Where this relationship is heading and its highest potential.

spreads.name: Career & Work Spread
spreads.description: A five-card spread examining your professional life, challenges, and direction.

positions.name: Current Situation
positions.description: Your current professional situation and energy.

positions.name: Your Strengths
positions.description: What you bring to the table — your skills and assets.

positions.name: The Challenge
positions.description: The main obstacle or challenge in your professional path.

positions.name: Recommended Action
positions.description: What action would best serve your career goals.

positions.name: Outcome / Direction
positions.description: Where your career is heading and the likely outcome.

spreads.name: Finance & Money Spread
spreads.description: A four-card spread examining your financial situation, blocks, and opportunities.

positions.name: Current Financial State
positions.description: Your current financial energy and situation.

positions.name: What Helps
positions.description: Factors, attitudes, or actions supporting financial growth.

positions.name: What Blocks
positions.description: What is blocking your financial abundance.

positions.name: Path to Abundance
positions.description: The recommended path toward financial wellbeing.

spreads.name: Health & Wellness Spread
spreads.description: A four-card spread addressing physical, emotional, and spiritual health.

positions.name: Your Body's Message
positions.description: What your body is communicating to you right now.

positions.name: What Drains Your Energy
positions.description: What is depleting your vital energy.

positions.name: What Supports Healing
positions.description: What nourishes and supports your healing.

positions.name: Path to Wholeness
positions.description: Your path toward complete health and vitality.

spreads.name: Celtic Cross
spreads.description: The most comprehensive tarot spread, providing a deep, multi-dimensional view of a situation.

positions.name: The Heart of the Matter
positions.description: The central issue or situation you are dealing with.

positions.name: Crossing Card (Challenge)
positions.description: What crosses or challenges the central issue — helping or hindering.

positions.name: Conscious Thoughts
positions.description: What you are consciously thinking about or focusing on.

positions.name: Subconscious Feelings
positions.description: What is hidden in your subconscious, underlying the situation.

positions.name: Past
positions.description: Recent events or energies passing out of the situation.

positions.name: Immediate Future
positions.description: What is coming in the near future.

positions.name: Your Approach / Attitude
positions.description: How you are approaching the situation and your own role.

positions.name: External Influences
positions.description: Environmental or other people's influence on the situation.

positions.name: Hopes and Fears
positions.description: Your deepest hopes and fears around this situation.

positions.name: Final Outcome
positions.description: The most likely outcome based on current energies.

spreads.name: Self-Growth & Spiritual Spread
spreads.description: A five-card spread for personal development, spiritual questions, and self-understanding.

positions.name: Who You Are Now
positions.description: Your current spiritual and personal state.

positions.name: What Holds You Back
positions.description: The shadow or pattern preventing growth.

positions.name: The Lesson
positions.description: The key lesson your soul is working on in this phase.

positions.name: What Nourishes Your Soul
positions.description: What truly feeds and nourishes your authentic self.

positions.name: Your Path Forward
positions.description: The direction your soul is calling you toward.

spreads.name: Yes / No Spread
spreads.description: Three cards drawn to gain clarity on a yes/no question through pattern reading.

positions.name: The Situation
positions.description: The current energy around your question.

positions.name: The Influence
positions.description: The key factor influencing the outcome.

positions.name: The Answer
positions.description: The card pointing toward yes or no, and why.

spreads.name: Binary Choice Spread
spreads.description: Compares two paths, options, or decisions side by side. Best when the user explicitly weighs two options (A vs B, stay vs leave, job A vs job B).

positions.name: Option A — Core Energy
positions.description: The essential nature and energy of the first option.

positions.name: Option A — What It Brings
positions.description: What choosing Option A will bring into your life.

positions.name: Option A — Challenge
positions.description: The difficulty or risk that comes with Option A.

positions.name: Option B — Core Energy
positions.description: The essential nature and energy of the second option.

positions.name: Option B — What It Brings
positions.description: What choosing Option B will bring into your life.

positions.name: Option B — Challenge
positions.description: The difficulty or risk that comes with Option B.

spreads.name: Horseshoe Spread
spreads.description: A seven-card spread covering past, present, hidden factors, obstacles, external environment, recommended approach, and final outcome. Ideal for multi-layered situations needing a full picture.

positions.name: Past
positions.description: What has led to this situation.

positions.name: Present
positions.description: The current state of affairs.

positions.name: Hidden Influences
positions.description: Factors at play beneath the surface — unconscious or unseen.

positions.name: Obstacle
positions.description: The main challenge or block to overcome.

positions.name: External Environment
positions.description: How others and the environment are influencing the situation.

positions.name: Recommended Approach
positions.description: The best attitude or action to take moving forward.

positions.name: Likely Outcome
positions.description: The probable outcome if current energies continue.

spreads.name: Month Ahead Spread
spreads.description: A four-card spread looking at the energy, opportunity, challenge, and key lesson for the coming month. Best for 'what's ahead this month' or 'monthly reading' questions.

positions.name: Overall Energy of the Month
positions.description: The dominant theme and energy shaping this month.

positions.name: Opportunity
positions.description: The main opportunity available to you this month.

positions.name: Challenge
positions.description: The main challenge or area requiring attention.

positions.name: Key Lesson
positions.description: The most important lesson this month is offering you.

spreads.name: Shadow Work Spread
spreads.description: A four-card spread focused on the shadow self — unconscious patterns, wounds, and the path to integration. For deep inner work, recurring patterns, or emotional healing questions.

positions.name: The Shadow
positions.description: The unconscious pattern, wound, or suppressed aspect of yourself.

positions.name: Root Cause
positions.description: Where this shadow originates — a past experience or belief.

positions.name: What It Protects
positions.description: What this shadow has been trying to protect you from.

positions.name: Path to Integration
positions.description: How to acknowledge, heal, and integrate this shadow into wholeness.
